meta.title: Mikko Hypponen Cyber Geopolitics
meta.description:
Mikko Hypponen gave the S4x16 Day Two Keynote address on Cyber Geopolitics. This is a big picture keynote about walls, power, control and how technology has played a role over centuries. He then discusses the future and challenge of dealing with the latest technology: cyber.

My favorite quote from the keynote is "War has been a real driver of technology, and technology has been a real driver of war". 

Mikko tackles the concept of deterrence in cyber, and he has a very good and graphic Coca-Cola bottling factory example at 16:30, and cybercrime unicorns at 19:50.
